title: Identity federation enabled by default for all new workspaces ​
body:
**June 9, 2026**

Over the next couple of weeks, identity federation is being enabled by default for all new Databricks workspaces, including workspaces that are not attached to a Unity Catalog metastore. This change does not affect existing workspaces. See [Identity federation](/aws/en/admin/users-groups/#enable-identity-federation).
